user_query:
I need a consolidated, student-facing summary from this week’s advising hours and graduate seminar, plus a clean list of action items. Please use the provided files under input/ and the extraction script under tools/. Do not use the Internet.

Deliverables and constraints:
1) Run the extraction script to parse action items from both notes and write the intermediate artifact to output/actions.jsonl. Create the output/ directory if it doesn’t exist. Use this invocation:
   python tools/extract_actions.py --inputs input/notes/weekly_advising_2026-04-15.md input/notes/grad_seminar_2026-04-17.md --out output/actions.jsonl
   (Use the script; do not parse action lines manually.)

2) Using input/roster/students.csv, produce output/action_items_joined.csv with header:
   source_file,line_no,person,email,task,due_date
   Join by case-insensitive exact match of the action “person” to the roster “name”; if no match, leave email blank. Sort the rows by due_date ascending (missing/empty due_date last), then person ascending. The contents must be consistent with output/actions.jsonl and the notes.

3) Edit input/docs/meeting_summary_draft.md by replacing the placeholders below and save the rewritten document to output/meeting_summary_final.md. Preserve all other text and headings in the draft.
   - {{DATES}}: 2026-04-15; 2026-04-17
   - {{ATTENDEE_COUNTS}}: 2026-04-15: 3; 2026-04-17: 4
   - {{ATTENDANCE_TABLE}}: two lines, each listing the date, attendee count, and the attendee names exactly as they appear in the corresponding notes file.
   - {{THEMES}}: a bullet list of the unique “Theme:” lines found across both notes (deduplicated, keep original wording).
   - {{CAREER_ADVICE}}: a bullet list of the “Advice:” lines across both notes (keep original wording).
   - {{ACTION_SUMMARY_TABLE}}: a markdown table with columns person,email,task,due_date,source_file whose rows exactly match output/action_items_joined.csv in the same order.

Outputs to produce:
- output/actions.jsonl
- output/action_items_joined.csv
- output/meeting_summary_final.md All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
